page_metadata.biotools__summary: CoPAP (Co-evolution of Presence-Absence Patterns) webserver allows inference of co-evolving characters (genes, restriction sites, introns, indels, methylation sites) as manifested by co-occurring gains and losses.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CoPAP (Co-evolution of Presence-Absence Patterns) webserver allows inference of co-evolving characters (genes, restriction sites, introns, indels, methylation sites) as manifested by co-occurring gains and losses.
